title: CuTe Learning - Education with Empathy
content: About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us CuTe App About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us Back to Pricing Most Popular Self Study Support Program A simple, focused space for your child to study with the right support. ₹3,500 Per Month How it works Students come in to study on their own in a quiet environment, with a teacher present to guide and solve doubts whenever needed. Each session has a maximum of 5 students, allowing for better focus and consistency. This is for students who: Don't want long, exhausting coaching hours. Prefer studying at their own pace. Still need someone to guide them when they get stuck. This plan helps students: Build a consistent, regular study habit. Stay disciplined without the pressure of a rigid coaching class. Get help exactly when they need it, fostering independence. Exclusive Parent Panel Access You will get access to our dedicated parent panels where you can directly connect with our founders and teachers, discuss your child’s progress, ask questions, or express any concerns. We believe parents and teachers are a team. Please Note: What is not included To keep this plan accessible and focused purely on self-study support, it does not include: Personalized 1:1 Classes Detailed Study Reports A great way to stay connected with us at a lower monthly cost. Join the Support Program Curious Team Learning Private Limited. A Support System to Nurture Every Child.
